androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Constra:
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/backButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="뒤로 가기" android:src="@drawable/baseline_arrow_back_ios_new_24" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" <<<<<<< HEAD app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_regular" /> ======= app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"/> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:text="회원정보를\n입력해 주세요" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/top_bar" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" android:textColor="@color/blue" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="24sp" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_bold" /> ======= android:textSize="24sp"/> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="30dp" android:text="이메일" android:textSize="16sp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_bold" /> ======= android:textStyle="bold" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/editTextEmail" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="이메일 입력" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="16sp" android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_medium" /> ======= android:textSize="16sp" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
<TextView android:layout_width="62dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:text="비밀번호" android:textSize="16sp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_bold" /> ======= android:textStyle="bold" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388

<TextView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="30dp" android:text="닉네임" android:textSize="16sp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:fontFamily="@font/pretendard_bold" /> ======= android:textStyle="bold" /> >>>>>>> 06810e8a6f8c10091a87e3e6215ebed5006c3388
